leagueMatchEvent.name: Super Jump-a-thon
leagueMatchEvent.desc:
Super Jump up and away! Stand by your
teammates with their Squid Beakons!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
Never fight alone with these high-speed Super Jumps to your allies' Squid Beakons!

・ You can only use weapons with the Squid Beakon sub weapon.
・ Super Jumps are much faster!
・ Only primary gear abilities will be enabled, except for Quick Super Jump and Sub Power Up. Secondary gear abilities will have no effect.

leagueMatchEvent.name: Supreme Sloshers
leagueMatchEvent.desc: Go forth and slosher the opposition!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
Do your slosher strats have what it takes? Let's find out!

・ Players can only choose different varieties of sloshers.
・ Both primary and secondary abilities will be enabled.
